evidence_summary: Establish the transition of john_carter from a vulnerable wanderer to a disguised traveler. The scene focuses on the ritualistic grooming process within the ptor_farmstead to ensure he can pass as a Red Martian for his journey to Zodanga.

Carter is rescued by the Ptor family at their farm. They provide him with food and perform a ritualistic grooming—applying red oil to his skin and cutting his hair—to help him pass as a Red Martian on his way to Zodanga.
john_carter is physically exhausted and vulnerable after wandering the wilderness.
john_carter is visually transformed with red skin and new hair, prepared for travel.
The Ptor family provides sustenance and performs a ritualistic grooming of John Carter.
